headline: Technical Textiles Company Evaluation Report 2025: Material Science Leaders Asahi Kasei, DuPont and Freudenberg Drive Innovation and Sustainable Growth
summary: Explore the evolving landscape of the global technical textiles industry with the Technical Textiles Companies Quadrant, a comprehensive analysis spotlighting the top 11 quadrant leaders out of over 100 evaluated entities. This sector, defined by advanced synthetic fibers and innovative production techniques, is vital for diverse applications spanning automotive, healthcare, and construction. headline: AGCO Appoints James C. Collins, Jr. to its Board of Directors
summary: AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) today announced the appointment of James C. Collins, Jr. to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. Collins brings nearly four decades of leadership experience across the global agriculture and food value chain, with a strong track record of driving innovation, growth and sustainable outcomes.
